channel.title: Containerlab on Gary Wong's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Containerlab on Gary Wong's Blog

item.title: Cumulus EVPN-VXLAN Lab — Built Fast with Containerlab
item.description: Building a Cumulus EVPN-VXLAN lab on Containerlab, validating it with vtysh and Linux bridge state, and using automation to move from topology to verification faster.

item.title: Arista SR-MPLS Lab — Rebuilt on Containerlab
item.description: Rebuilding my SR-MPLS lab from EVE-NG to Containerlab, with a cleaner topology, versioned configs, and a reproducible design process.
